suggestions.description: Head to the Kenilworth Aquatic Gardens, a unique park featuring aquatic plants and flowers along the Anacostia River. Take in the serene atmosphere and enjoy the beauty of nature.

suggestions.name: Capitol Hill Park

suggestions.name: Anacostia Waterfront
suggestions.description: Head to the Anacostia Waterfront, where you can stroll along the boardwalk, admire the views of the river, and enjoy public art installations. It's a peaceful retreat from the hustle and bustle of the city.
